## Problem

What user problem are we solving?

## Proposed Solution

Describe your idea clearly.

## Target User

Who benefits most from this?

- [ ] Script/tooling
- [ ] Template

## Success Criteria

How do we know this is valuable?

## Additional Context

Links, references, or examples.
